MysticPotionPaytable.PayoutRules1: Mystic Potion is a 6 by 6 symbols combination video slot featuring big symbols with multipliers up to x500.
MysticPotionPaytable.PayoutRules2: The game is played with 20 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
MysticPotionPaytable.PayoutDesc1: At every spin, any combinations of 5 or more symbols touching horizontally or vertically will result in a winning combination.
MysticPotionPaytable.PayoutDesc2: Winning combinations and payouts are made according to the "Paytable".
MysticPotionPaytable.PayoutDesc3: A combination win in cash is equal to the value shown in the Paytable multiplied by the bet size and bet multiplier.
MysticPotionPaytable.PayoutDesc4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
MysticPotionPaytable.PayoutDesc5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
MysticPotionPaytable.PayoutDesc6: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
MysticPotionPaytable.PayoutDesc7: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

MysticPotionPaytableShared.BigSymbolFeatureDesc1: If there are 4 matching symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) adjacent to each other in a square shape, a Big Symbol is formed with a multiplier ranging from x2 to x500.
MysticPotionPaytableShared.BigSymbolFeatureDesc2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, multiplier(s) will be collected from any Big symbol that was involved in a win in the previous round.
MysticPotionPaytableShared.BigSymbolFeatureDesc3: At the end of every spin, the total win of that spin will be multiplied by the total multiplier collected.
MysticPotionPaytableShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 15 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
MysticPotionPaytableShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc2: Any multipliers collected during any free spin will be added and will remain at the bottom of the reels until the end of the Free Spins Feature.
MysticPotionPaytableShared.FreeSpinFeatureDesc3: At the end of every free spin, the total win of that spin will be multiplied by the total multiplier collected.
MysticPotionPaytableShared.MaximumWinDesc1: The maximum win amount is %{10000}x of the bet amount.
MysticPotionPaytableShared.MaximumWinDesc2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{10000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.
